meta.note: Sivesh's Double (1xBet) — two match parlays combined, so it wins only if BOTH parlays land (all nine legs). Parlay 1 (France v Spain @3.09): Yamal / Dembele over 0.5 SOT, Mbappe over 1.5 SOT, France to qualify. Parlay 2 (England v Argentina @3.46): over 1.5 total goals, both teams to score, Kane / Messi / Alvarez over 0.5 SOT. All legs auto-settle against verified ESPN results; the qualify leg settles on advancement (90 min, extra time, or penalties).
meta.disclaimer: Fun-money tracking only. Returns shown are stake x odds (includes the stake back). Legs settle against ESPN's official match result and statistics.
